entries.activity: LastCall bartender staffing site built & live
entries.detail: 1,840 lines, dark whiskey theme, 9 sections (hero, how it works, 6 bartender profiles, 3 pricing tiers, recruitment, live dashboard, testimonials, FAQ, footer). Interactive: sticky header, mobile menu, accordion, pulsing CTA. Live: https://dadesmike-design.github.io/rylem-site/lastcall-demo/

entries.activity: Hospitality AI booking bot pitch drafted
entries.detail: Target: Brent Bushnell (DreamPark + Two Bit Circus). Pitch: 30-second response vs 24-48hr gap. Conversational intake → company enrichment → availability check → Telegram alert. Copy-paste ready.
Santa Monica venue (1220 3rd St Promenade). Arcade + bar + VR/AR/MR. Founder: Brent Bushnell (also owns DreamPark). Private events: $1,500+, Mon-Thu buyouts. Contact: events@twobitcircus.com
Seattle mixed-reality theme park (West Canal Yards). Corporate team builds + birthday parties. Founder: Brent Bushnell (son of Atari/Chuck E. Cheese founder). Featured on Shark Tank (Apr 2025).
Mike testing topics by sending messages. Only topic 1 (General) registered so far.
v3: 13 touches in 21 days (down from 31). Phone at Day 7, email at Day 6. LinkedIn-declined fork. Saved to memory/sales/13-step-sales-sequence-v3.md
77 placements, 40+ clients. Top active: PACCAR (12), UpTop (5). Restorables: tinyBuild (6), Frazier (6), TrueBlue (3).
5-layer JD breakdown, red flags, 10 pre-sourcing Qs, VMS vs Non-VMS, 4 practice JDs, quiz. Live on training site.
